steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $348$.

steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $w+6=354$. To isolate $w$, subtract $6$ from both sides.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A — $59$ would come from dividing $354$ by $6$. Choice C — $360$ would come from adding $6$. The equation asks for $w$ in $w+6=354$, so Choice B, $348$, is correct.
